free_text: Direct Excitation of Nuclear Energy States in Carbon
The 0.948 G/Cm**2 Carbon Target was of Commercial Grade
The Telescope Consisted of Nine Counters.  Each Counter
Consisted of a  Stilbene  Crystal  About  0.24  G/Cm**2
Thick    Which    was    Mounted    Against   an   1P21
The Uncertainty is Reported by Authors.
Errors Shown are of Statistical Origin Only.
- By Authors - The Absolute Values of the Cross
Sections are Believed to be Good to +-4%.
The Absolute Values of the Proton Energies are Accurate
